description:
All 3 sankey samples show rect count warnings:
- sankey_simple: rect count (0 vs 5)
- sankey_complex: rect count (0 vs 6)
- sankey_energy_full: rect count (0 vs 48)

Visual similarity: 5.9% to 32.8%, structural: 96.5% to 98.2%. Flow paths may render but node rectangles are missing. Check src/diagrams/sankey/ against reference.
title: sankey: Missing node rectangles
